sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, shape VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) AS interior_rings FROM geo_shapes WHERE bif:contains(shape, 'POLYGON') AND ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY interior_rings DESC;
CREATE TABLE geo_metadata (shape_id INT REFERENCES geo_shapes(id), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO geo_metadata (shape_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Simple polygon'), (2, 'Another simple polygon'), (3, 'Not a polygon'), (4, 'Multipolygon example');

SELECT gm.description, ST_NumInteriorRings(gs.shape) FROM geo_metadata gm JOIN geo_shapes gs ON gm.shape_id = gs.id WHERE gm.description LIKE '%polygon%' AND ST_NumInteriorRings(gs.shape) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bif:contains(shape, (SELECT shape FROM geo_shapes WHERE id = 1)) AS contains_flag FROM geo_shapes WHERE ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(DISTINCT ST_NumInteriorRings(shape)) AS ring_count FROM geo_shapes GROUP BY id HAVING ring_count > 0 OR shape IS NULL;
SELECT shape, CASE WHEN ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) IS NULL THEN 'Not a polygon' ELSE 'Valid polygon' END AS validity FROM geo_shapes WHERE bif:contains(shape, '5') OR shape IS NULL ORDER BY validity;

SELECT P.id, ST_NumInteriorRings(P.shape) AS rings FROM geo_shapes P LEFT JOIN geo_shapes S ON ST_NumInteriorRings(P.shape) = ST_NumInteriorRings(S.shape) WHERE S.id IS NULL AND ST_NumInteriorRings(P.shape) < 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM geo_shapes WHERE ST_NumInteriorRings(shape) IS NOT NULL AND shape NOT LIKE 'POINT%') AS filtered_shapes;
